output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?label WHERE {
  wd:Q8153 rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
}
LIMIT 1
output.result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| label                  |
| ---------------------- |
| West Lampung (lang:en) |
